subcodes.first_line: Say: O my God, verily you are the Creator of the heavens and the earth and whatsoever lies between them. You give creation to whom You will and take creation from whom You will
subcodes.first_line_orig: الله اکبر. قل اللهم انک انت فطار السموآت و الارض و ما بینهما لتؤتین الفطرته من تشآء و لتنز
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @The Primal Will; self-generation of the Primal Will
